text: I feel curious and just a little disoriented. The repetition of 'Okay' echoes inside me, as if I'm preparing myself for something new or uncertain. The sleek, glass-walled space and bright, bold R+D installation suggest innovation and creativity. I am both a participant and a witness, alert and open to discovery, but also aware of my own smallness in this environment of research and development. It is an intersection of anticipation and reflection.
